This add-on uses the following open-source JavaScript libraries:

JSZIP
-------------------
GitHub page: https://github.com/Stuk/jszip
Download link: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Stuk/jszip/master/dist/jszip.js

EPUB
-------------------
GitHub page: https://github.com/futurepress/epub.js
Download link: https://github.com/futurepress/epub.js/releases/download/v0.3.73/epub.js
